info.title: E-Commerce API
info.description: E-Commerce Platform APIs - Complete backend for managing products, orders, payments, and users

tags.name: Content Management
tags.description: APIs for file upload and download using AWS S3

tags.name: Public Cart
tags.description: Shopping cart operations for anonymous and authenticated users

put.description: Update item quantity. Validates stock availability.

Change order status with lifecycle validation. Valid transitions are enforced by state machine. Example valid transitions: NEW→PAYMENT_PENDING, PAID→SHIPPED, SHIPPED→COMPLETED. Invalid transitions will return 400 Bad Request.

409.description: Category name or slug already exists
Cannot delete category with associated products

post.description: Submit a refund request for an order. Request will be in PENDING status and requires admin approval before processing. Validates that order has been paid and requested amount does not exceed remaining refundable amount.

400.description: Order not paid or invalid refund amount

post.description: Create new shopping cart. Returns sessionId for anonymous users.
Add product to cart. Validates stock and product status.
Upload a file to AWS S3 and receive metadata including access URL. Supports images, PDFs, and documents. Maximum file size: 10MB.
Create order from existing cart. Validates stock, calculates totals, and generates order. Requires X-SESSION-ID header for anonymous carts.

400.description: Cart is empty or validation failed

409.description: Cart already checked out or insufficient stock

post.description: Create a new user account with CUSTOMER role. Email must be unique. Password is hashed before storage. Returns JWT token for immediate authentication.
Authenticate user with email and password. Returns JWT token that must be included in Authorization header as 'Bearer <token>' for accessing protected endpoints.

get.description: Get paginated list of products with filters (ADMIN only)

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search by product name or slug

post.description: Execute a refund for an order through the payment gateway. Validates refund amount against available refundable amount. Updates order status to REFUNDED if fully refunded. Updates linked RefundRequest status to PROCESSED if successful.

400.description: Invalid refund request (amount exceeds refundable, order not paid, etc.)

get.description: Get paginated list of categories with filters (ADMIN only)

post.description: Create a new product category (ADMIN only)

409.description: Category name or slug already exists

get.description: Get paginated list of active products with optional filtering

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search by product name or slug

get.description: Get detailed product information by slug
Get paginated list of categories with optional filtering
Get cart details. Requires X-SESSION-ID header for anonymous carts.
Download a file from AWS S3 by its ID. File is streamed directly without loading into memory.
List orders with optional filtering and pagination

parameters.name: dateFrom
parameters.description: Filter by minimum creation date (ISO-8601 format)

parameters.name: dateTo
parameters.description: Filter by maximum creation date (ISO-8601 format)

get.description: Retrieve detailed order information including items
Get paginated list of customers with filters (ADMIN only)

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search by full name or email

get.description: Test endpoint for verifying admin authorization. Requires ADMIN role. Returns 403 for CUSTOMER role and 401 for unauthenticated.
